resources.name: [concat(parameters('factoryName'), '/Copy CSV files from data lake to SQL DB as table name of the csv folder name')]

activities.name: Copy data from adls to sqlDB table

source.sqlReaderQuery: select max (Date_ID) as maxdate from source_cars_data;

sqlReaderQuery.value: select * from source_cars_data where Date_ID > '@{activity('lastload').output.value[0].last_load}' AND Date_ID <= '@{activity('currentload').output.value[0].maxdate}'
